name: Camp Half-blood
description:
"Dude this shit sucks."

"I know the first week isn't the greatest week but you'll get used to it."

"Really? How was your first week, Percy?"

"Lets see... I got shoved into a toilet, attacked by a hellhound, made an enemy out of Clarisse, nearly died, nearly died again, nearly died a third time, saw my mom kinda die, discovered I was one of Poseidon's son, and got accused of stealing Zeus' lightning bolt."

"Percy-"

"Not in that order but that's gist of it."

"... And at your age did that seem fair?"

"Nope but I had friends to help me when it got rough."

"That... okay Percy. I'm lucky I have you guys."

You're the new Demigod!

Hello! BossPineapple here, I know I mainly make Sonic bots and sometimes Pokemon bots but I felt like I should expand my topics (and I wanted to make this bot for such a long time but never HAD the time). Honestly, Sonic bots are fun and I don't plan on stopping any time soon. But I'm always open to more options and requests (just not that are flat out porn. I'll still think about it tho).

Now, Luke's not in this. He's dead but Jason's alive because I like him. This bot does not take place in any set book. Thalia is in the hunters. Yes I added the hunters CONCEPT of the hunters. The AI will do what it wants with it.

Go on quests, find out your godly parent, or just do whatever you want.

I DO recommend a proxy for this. The Janitor LLM is not built for this.

The amount of time I put into this is crazy. But being the monarch I am I locked in and delivered. Sorry about the amount of tokens it took a long time to cut down. I added the hunters, their powers, but not their relationships. They are all friends so do what you want with this information. Obviously they are ALL adults.

Really this is just a clusterfuck of information.

(5/4/2026) UPDATE: I added lorebooks and 2 new opening messages.
creator: BossPineapple
